about_the_product.description: The MPG series brings out the best in gamers by allowing full expression in color with advanced RGB lighting control and synchronization. Experiment on another level of personalization with a front LED strip that provides convenient in-game and real time notifications. With the MPG series, transform your equipment into the center of attention and top leaderboards in style.

user_reviews.title: What an amazing Motherboard
user_reviews.text:
I have spend a month deciding for a motherboard for my AM5 build. I was between X870 Tomahawk or X879E Carbon.

TBH, the Tomahawk yellow/green accent is not the thing I like about it. So I decided to go with the Carbon (Expensive, I know) but I build a new PC every 7 or 8 years, so I needed to have the best thing.

It is an amazing build quality and really heavy. It has all the connections I needed for my Lian Li Dynamic Evo XL Case.

I wish it was a little bit cheaper than that, but it is worth it

user_reviews.title: Great board with minor gotchas
user_reviews.text:
I bought this board without double checking the specs and assumed it's the same board with same PCIE lane configuration as the X670E Carbon. Just a gotcha that a 4x PCIE5 to CPU lane are now used up by the new USB4.0s. Whereas with X670E Carbon, this 4x PCIE5 4x lanes is used by another M.2 drive slot. Depends what you want, this can be a deal breaker.

Overall a stable board with a great BIOS UI overhaul. 6000MHz 2 stick 64GB of RAM runs stable at 30 36 36 76 timings. Do note the DDR5 ram overclockability is the combined factor of CPU, RAM and Mainboard. Not just the RAM itself.

Performance:x870e carbon

Great,I think this is the most reasonable pcie lane allocation among amd 8xx series motherboards, except godlike.The only drawback is that you can't disable USB4 to free up more PCIe lanes.Imo,I think x870e carbon is the most pretty AM5 motherboard from MSI.

The customer service attitude is very poor, with mostly robotic responses. They are likely just following a scripted formula from their notes to brush off inquiries rather than actually helping to solve your problem. However, their prices are lower than competitors—otherwise, I wouldn’t recommend buying from them.

Performance:superb

Sorry for the late review, been quite busy. Item recieved in good condition. Been tested using old cpu & gpu, works just fine. Still waited my new cpu & gpu for new build using this mobo

Quiet heavy hahah..overall the packaging is nice with bubble wrap...but theres is a small dented on the middle of box..not sure is original defect or what but doesn't affect the whole board lah... Havent tested yet but hope its nice

Fast delivery, but with damage on the box, and the back I/O plate cuts through the anti static bag at the place where the box is damaged. Could use more protection when packaging. at this point no visible physical damage yet, will update this review after testing

user_reviews.title: Powerful
user_reviews.text:
This mobo is awesome. It was my replacement after my extremely and excessively poor exerprience with gigabyte and their motherboards and customer service.

It is speedy, and, a about two to three months in, I have had zero issues since installation. Everything about it from building on it to the first is a mostly smooth process. The wifi drivers specifically were a minor annoyance that can be rememdied with the usb that is provided with the motherboard. The drivers arent already on the motherboard nor the USB, so make sure to download/export on to the USB and have it ready while setting up during first boot.

Playing around in the BIOs was a very easy and straightforward process as well.

Below is a photo of it hastily put together inside a hyte y70 case with RGBs lit up. They are nice and bright and I have had zero issues.

There are also plenty of ports on the motherboard which made putting everything together so quickly that much easier.

This is my introduction to MSI, and I intend to keep an eye on them going forward. But with this motherboard, I have a feeling it'll be for a little while.
